data.title: Zero Trust Security
data.description: Adopts a zero trust model that assumes threats are present inside and outside the network.
data.technical_spec: Identity-based access controls and multi-factor authentication.

data.title: Data Encryption
data.description: Utilizes strong encryption methods to protect data both in transit and at rest.
data.technical_spec: AES-256 encryption for data storage and TLS/SSL for data transmission.

data.title: Regular Security Audits
data.description: Frequent security audits and vulnerability assessments to prevent breaches.
data.technical_spec: Third-party audits and internal vulnerability scanning tools.

data.title: Advanced Threat Detection
data.description: Deploys AI-powered solutions to detect and mitigate advanced cyber threats in real-time.

data.title: Incident Response Plan
data.description: Comprehensive incident response strategy to handle any data breaches or cyber attacks.
data.technical_spec: Robust policies, procedures, and a dedicated security operations center.
